summary: Backend (14 pytest cases) and frontend smoke testing for Pizza Denfert Loyalty tablet app. ALL 14 backend tests PASS (100%): /api/healthz, admin login (admin@pizzadenfert.fr/Admin1234!), OTP demo mode (returns dev_code + demo_mode=true), OTP verify (creates/logs in customer), public /api/menu returns 21 items, admin menu CRUD (create/patch/delete + 401 without token), admin QR scan + add-pizza + redeem (coffee threshold), admin dashboard period=all returns expected stats keys (total_pizzas_sold, loyalty_members, vip_customers, etc.), public /api/ads/slides (slides + settings), admin ad slide CRUD, admin search by phone and by name. Frontend smoke tests on tablet viewport (1024x768) confirm: / redirects to /kiosk and displays rotating promo slides ('Rejoignez le Club Pizza Denfert'); /account renders VIP loyalty card and phone OTP form; OTP request returns and DISPLAYS the demo code on-screen ('Mode démo · Code : 423809') as expected; /admin login screen has the three required testIDs (admin-email-input, admin-password-input, admin-login-btn) and a successful login renders admin-panel with QR scanner notice (web is expected to show 'scanner only available on mobile'), manual search box, and all shortcut buttons (Réservations, Menu, Paramètres, Statistiques, Personnel, Publicités, Mode Kiosque); open-cms-btn navigates to /admin-cms/dashboard which lists every menu item grouped by category (Pizzas·7, Focaccias·2, Gratins·2, Salades·2, Desserts·2, Boissons·3, Vins·3); /admin-ads loads the slide list grouped by section with kiosk settings. No deprecated expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch packages — app uses expo-camera 17 (current).

react_native_issues.issue: Console emits repeated warnings: '"textShadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "textShadow".' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Non-blocking but should be cleaned up app-wide for forward compatibility.

Console warning '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web. Adding a listener will have no effect.' — expected on web preview, no action needed unless adding native push features.

action_items: OPTIONAL: clean up deprecated React Native style props (textShadow*, props.pointerEvents) across components — emits warnings on every page load.

INFO: The /admin scanner area correctly displays 'Le scanner caméra n'est disponible que sur l'app mobile' on web — this is expected since expo-camera only works on native (per agent context). Not a bug.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is large (>1300 lines visible). Consider splitting into routers (auth, menu, loyalty, reservations, ads, push) once the app stabilizes — not blocking, but improves maintainability.
Admin login endpoint /api/auth/login returns user object without checking is_admin gate — admin flag is set in DB seed and frontend gates on user.is_admin (verified working). Acceptable.
seed_data_creation: Tests create transient TEST_ prefixed menu items + ad slides and clean them up (delete) in-test. Customer fixture creates one user per test session via OTP demo flow (phone +3360XXXXXXXX); not cleaned but harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://pizza-tablet-build.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin: admin@pizzadenfert.fr / Admin1234!. OTP is DEMO MODE — POST /api/auth/otp/request returns demo_mode=true + dev_code; pass dev_code to /api/auth/otp/verify. Menu is now MongoDB-backed (Supabase removed); seed (21 items) runs only when collection empty. Run regression tests with: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_loyalty_api.py -v. Frontend testIDs verified: admin-email-input, admin-password-input, admin-login-btn, admin-panel, open-cms-btn. Kiosk admin lives at /admin-ads. QR camera scanner only works on native (web preview shows a notice — not a bug).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration. Pre-existing main-agent fixes (Supabase removal → MongoDB menu, LOYALTY mode forcing, local expo-font, demo OTP plumbing) all verified working end-to-end via API + UI.
